feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: ‘Marseille, terre de foot’ : FC Septèmes

link.title: ‘Marseille, terre de foot’ : FC Septèmes

entry.content: Le FC Septèmes, c’est l’histoire de quelques copains du village qui sur un coup de tête se lancent dans l’aventure. Ce village, c’est Septèmes-les-Vallons, au nord de Marseille, à quelques minutes de la zone commerciale de Plan de Campagne. Ici, le football est une raison de vivre. Presque un rite. Zinédine Zidane, Samir Nasri et tout récemment Lihadji se sont exprimés sur les terrains cabossés de Septèmes. Depuis, les gazons synthétiques ont couvert les bosses. Salah Nasri, l’oncle de Samir n’est-il pas le mieux placé en tant que président de ce jeune club ambitieux pour incarner son ambition ?
entry.summary: Le FC Septèmes, c’est l’histoire de quelques copains du village qui sur un coup de tête se lancent dans l’aventure. Ce village, c’est Septèmes-les-Vallons, au nord de Marseille, à quelques minutes de la zone commerciale de Plan de Campagne. Ici, le football est une raison de vivre. Presque un rite. Zinédine Zidane, Samir Nasri et tout récemment Lihadji se sont exprimés sur les terrains cabossés de Septèmes. Depuis, les gazons synthétiques ont couvert les bosses. Salah Nasri, l’oncle de Samir n’est-il pas le mieux placé en tant que président de ce jeune club ambitieux pour incarner son ambition ?

entry.title: Coronavirus : quels critères pourraient entraîner un reconfinement ?

link.title: Coronavirus : quels critères pourraient entraîner un reconfinement ?

entry.content:
Cette obligation du port du masque intervient alors que des signes de reprise de l’épidémie sont observés presque partout en France, comme dans le Finistère et en Mayenne. On peut se demander si un reconfinement aura lieu. 
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Cette obligation du port du masque intervient alors que des signes de reprise de l’épidémie sont observés presque partout en France, comme dans le Finistère et en Mayenne. On peut se demander si un reconfinement aura lieu. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: #Watch COVID Asymptomatic Patients Flash Mob Pune Girl Grand Welcome to Sister- Videos Viral

link.title: #Watch COVID Asymptomatic Patients Flash Mob Pune Girl Grand Welcome to Sister- Videos Viral

entry.content:
Asymptomatic patients at a COVID care centre in Karnataka’s Ballari on July 19 performed a flash mob to life people’s spirit against the Corona virus. The dancers included doctors, policemen and locals.
#coronavirusIndia
#FlashMob
#COVIDAsymptomaticPatients
#Ballari
#Karnataka
#COVID19
#pune
#COVIDcarecentre
#Mastumastusangathundisong
#bollywoodsongs
ప్రస్తుతం కరోనాపై విజయం సాధించడమంటే నిజంగానే ఒక యుద్ధంలో విజయం సాధించినంత ఆనందంగా ఫీల్ అవుతున్నారు కరోనాబారిన పడి కోలుకున్న పేషెంట్లు. తాజాగా పూణేకు చెందిన ఓ యువతి కరోనావైరస్ నుంచి కోలుకుని ఇంటికి చేరుకుంది. అంతే ఆమెకు తమ కుటుంబ సభ్యులు పలికిన ఘనస్వాగతం చూసి షాక్ అయ్యింది. అంతేకాదు ఆమె కూడా డ్యాన్స్ వేయడం మొదలుపెట్టింది. ప్రస్తుతం ఈ వీడియో సోషల్ మీడియాలో వైరల్‌గా మారింది. పూణేలో నివాసముంటున్న ఒక యువతి కరోనావైరస్ నుంచి కోలుకుని తిరిగి ఇంటికి చేరుకోగానే తన సోదరి ఆమెకు స్టెప్పులతో గ్రాండ్ వెల్కమ్ పలికింది. బాలీవుడ్ సినిమా చిల్లర్ పార్టీ నుంచి తాయ్ తాయ్ ఫిష్ పాటకు స్టెప్పులేస్తూ కరోనా బారినపడి ఆ మహమ్మారిపై విజయం సాధించిన తన సోదరికి ఘనస్వాగతం పలికింది.
entry.summary: Asymptomatic patients at a COVID care centre in Karnataka’s Ballari on July 19 performed a flash mob to life people’s spirit against the Corona virus. The dancers included doctors, policemen and locals. #coronavirusIndia #FlashMob #COVIDAsymptomaticPatients #Ballari #Karnataka #COVID19 #pune #COVIDcarecentre #Mastumastusangathundisong #bollywoodsongs ప్రస్తుతం కరోనాపై విజయం సాధించడమంటే నిజంగానే ఒక యుద్ధంలో విజయం సాధించినంత ఆనందంగా ఫీల్ అవుతున్నారు కరోనాబారిన పడి కోలుకున్న పేషెంట్లు. తాజాగా పూణేకు చెందిన ఓ యువతి కరోనావైరస్ నుంచి కోలుకుని ఇంటికి చేరుకుంది. అంతే ఆమెకు తమ కుటుంబ సభ్యులు పలికిన ఘనస్వాగతం చూసి షాక్ అయ్యింది. అంతేకాదు ఆమె కూడా డ్యాన్స్ వేయడం మొదలుపెట్టింది. ప్రస్తుతం ఈ వీడియో సోషల్ మీడియాలో వైరల్‌గా మారింది. పూణేలో నివాసముంటున్న ఒక యువతి కరోనావైరస్ నుంచి కోలుకుని తిరిగి ఇంటికి చేరుకోగానే తన సోదరి ఆమెకు స్టెప్పులతో గ్రాండ్ వెల్కమ్ పలికింది. బాలీవుడ్ సినిమా చిల్లర్ పార్టీ నుంచి తాయ్ తాయ్ ఫిష్ పాటకు స్టెప్పులేస్తూ కరోనా బారినపడి ఆ మహమ్మారిపై విజయం సాధించిన తన సోదరికి ఘనస్వాగతం పలికింది.

entry.title: Macron souhaite ‘le port du masque obligatoire dans les lieux publics clos’

link.title: Macron souhaite ‘le port du masque obligatoire dans les lieux publics clos’

entry.content:
Pour la première fois depuis son accession à la présidence de la République en 2017, Emmanuel Macron a accordé une interview le 14 Juillet, jour de la fête nationale, comme c’était la tradition.
Pour continuer de lutter contre la lutte contre le coronavirus, le port du masque sera rendu obligatoire dans les lieux publics clos, tels que les magasins. « Il faut continuer d’appliquer les gestes barrière. On voit des faiblesses» a indiqué le président qui était interviewé par les journalistes Léa Salamé et Gilles Bouleau.
entry.summary: Pour la première fois depuis son accession à la présidence de la République en 2017, Emmanuel Macron a accordé une interview le 14 Juillet, jour de la fête nationale, comme c’était la tradition. Pour continuer de lutter contre la lutte contre le coronavirus, le port du masque sera rendu obligatoire dans les lieux publics clos, tels que les magasins. « Il faut continuer d’appliquer les gestes barrière. On voit des faiblesses» a indiqué le président qui était interviewé par les journalistes Léa Salamé et Gilles Bouleau.

entry.title: ENG vs WI 2nd Test Day 1: WI opt to bowl, Joe Root and Broad back for England वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: ENG vs WI 2nd Test Day 1: WI opt to bowl, Joe Root and Broad back for England वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
West Indies captain Jason Holder won the toss and opted to field first in the second Test match at Manchester. England have made four changes to their side. Joe Root, Stuart Broad, Chris Woakes and Sam Curran replaced Joe Denly, James Anderson, Mark Wood, and Jofra Archer.
इंग्लैंड और वेस्टइंडीज के बीच तीन मैचों की सीरीज का दूसरा मुकाबला मैनचेस्टर में खेला जा रहा है। वेस्टइंडीज के कप्तान जेसन होल्डर ने टॉस जीतकर पहले गेंदबाजी करने का फैसला लिया है। बारिश की वजह से टॉस में देरी हुई और पहले सेशन में लंच से पहले 1 घंटे का खेल ही हो पाएगा।
#ENGvsWI #2ndTest #JasonHolder
entry.summary: West Indies captain Jason Holder won the toss and opted to field first in the second Test match at Manchester. England have made four changes to their side. Joe Root, Stuart Broad, Chris Woakes and Sam Curran replaced Joe Denly, James Anderson, Mark Wood, and Jofra Archer. इंग्लैंड और वेस्टइंडीज के बीच तीन मैचों की सीरीज का दूसरा मुकाबला मैनचेस्टर में खेला जा रहा है। वेस्टइंडीज के कप्तान जेसन होल्डर ने टॉस जीतकर पहले गेंदबाजी करने का फैसला लिया है। बारिश की वजह से टॉस में देरी हुई और पहले सेशन में लंच से पहले 1 घंटे का खेल ही हो पाएगा। #ENGvsWI #2ndTest #JasonHolder

entry.title: Cathédrale de Nantes : le bénévole remis en liberté

link.title: Cathédrale de Nantes : le bénévole remis en liberté

entry.content:
Accident ou acte volontaire, aucune piste n’est pour l’instant écartée. Le bénévole qui avait été placé en garde à vue a été remis en liberté. En duplex de Nantes, David Jouillat nous en dit plus sur les suites de l’enquête.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Accident ou acte volontaire, aucune piste n’est pour l’instant écartée. Le bénévole qui avait été placé en garde à vue a été remis en liberté. En duplex de Nantes, David Jouillat nous en dit plus sur les suites de l’enquête. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Rishi Sunak defends government’s economic plan

link.title: Rishi Sunak defends government’s economic plan

entry.content:
Chancellor Rishi Sunak has defended the government’s ‘comprehensive’ plan to respond to the economic crisis caused by the Covid-19 pandemic.
Report by Etemadil. Like us on Facebook at and follow us on Twitter at

entry.content:
Mercredi 22 juillet, le film “Adorables” sort dans les salles obscures. Dans cette comédie sur un conflit parents-enfants, tous les coups sont permis.

entry.title: MS Dhoni’s loyalty, Gary Kirsten reveals

link.title: MS Dhoni’s loyalty, Gary Kirsten reveals

entry.content:
#dhoni
தோனி தன் அணிக்கு எந்த அளவுக்கு உண்மையாக இருந்தார் என்பது பற்றி முன்னாள் பயிற்சியாளர் கேரி கிர்ஸ்டன் விவரித்துள்ளார்.
Dhoni cancelled team trip when Gary Kirsten was not allowed inside a flight school
entry.summary: #dhoni தோனி தன் அணிக்கு எந்த அளவுக்கு உண்மையாக இருந்தார் என்பது பற்றி முன்னாள் பயிற்சியாளர் கேரி கிர்ஸ்டன் விவரித்துள்ளார். Dhoni cancelled team trip when Gary Kirsten was not allowed inside a flight school

entry.title: Dil Ruba Episode 17 HUM TV Drama 18 July 2020

link.title: Dil Ruba Episode 17 HUM TV Drama 18 July 2020

entry.content:
Dil Ruba, Episode 17, Official HD Video - 17 July 2020
Moomal Entertainment & MD Productions Presents "Dil Ruba" on HUM TV.
Starring:
Hania Aamir, Mohib Mirza, Shehroz Sabzwari, Syed Jibran, Marina Khan, Ghana Tahir, Nabeel Aijaz Zuberi, Saad Azhar, Saira Wasti, Sajeer Uddin, Zain Afzal, Dur-e-Fishan Saleem, Amber Khan, Huma Nawab, Khalid Anam, Sheharyar Zaidi, Jawed Iqbal, Rehana Akhter, Mirza Rizwan Nabi, Asad Siddiqui & Others.
Directed By: Ali Hasan
Written By: Qaisera Hayat
Produced By: Momina Duraid Production
#DilRuba #HUMTV #HaniaAamir #MohibMirza #ShehrozSabzwari #Drama #2020

entry.title: Dummy Trailer 07 06 2020

link.title: Dummy Trailer 07 06 2020

entry.content:
Dummy (Quibi) Starring: Anna Kendrick, Meredith Hagner and Donal Logue
Based loosely on the life of creator Cody Heller, Dummy is a female buddy comedy about an aspiring screenwriter (Anna Kendrick) who befriends her boyfriend’s sex doll and the two take on the world together. Creator and Writer: Cody Heller
Director: Tricia Brock
Executive Producers: Anna Kendrick, Cody Heller, Tricia Brock
Produced by: Wiip
# of Episodes: 10
entry.summary: Dummy (Quibi) Starring: Anna Kendrick, Meredith Hagner and Donal Logue Based loosely on the life of creator Cody Heller, Dummy is a female buddy comedy about an aspiring screenwriter (Anna Kendrick) who befriends her boyfriend’s sex doll and the two take on the world together. Creator and Writer: Cody Heller Director: Tricia Brock Executive Producers: Anna Kendrick, Cody Heller, Tricia Brock Produced by: Wiip # of Episodes: 10

entry.title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows published, other events in history Oneindia News

link.title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows published, other events in history Oneindia News

entry.content:
The Treaty of the Pruth was signed on the banks of the river Pruth between the Ottoman Empire and the Tsardom of Russia on 21 July 1711, ending the Russo-Turkish War of 1710–1711. The treaty was a relative political victory for Russia in spite of the military defeat. Belgium became independent as Leopold I was proclaimed King of the Belgians. The national holiday of Belgium is celebrated annually on July 21st.
Independence Day celebrates the separation of Belgium from the Netherlands in 1831, as well as the formal establishment of the Kingdom.
The Geneva Conference partitioned Vietnam into North Vietnam and South Vietnam. In July 1954, the Geneva Agreements were signed. As part of the agreement, the French agreed to withdraw their troops from northern Vietnam. Vietnam would be temporarily divided at the 17th parallel, pending elections within two years to choose a president and reunite the country. The seventh and final novel, Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows, was published on 21 July 2007. The book sold 11 million copies in the first 24 hours of release, breaking down to 2.7 million copies in the UK and 8.3 million in the US.
entry.summary: The Treaty of the Pruth was signed on the banks of the river Pruth between the Ottoman Empire and the Tsardom of Russia on 21 July 1711, ending the Russo-Turkish War of 1710–1711. The treaty was a relative political victory for Russia in spite of the military defeat. Belgium became independent as Leopold I was proclaimed King of the Belgians. The national holiday of Belgium is celebrated annually on July 21st. Independence Day celebrates the separation of Belgium from the Netherlands in 1831, as well as the formal establishment of the Kingdom. The Geneva Conference partitioned Vietnam into North Vietnam and South Vietnam. In July 1954, the Geneva Agreements were signed. As part of the agreement, the French agreed to withdraw their troops from northern Vietnam. Vietnam would be temporarily divided at the 17th parallel, pending elections within two years to choose a president and reunite the country. The seventh and final novel, Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows, was published on 21 July 2007. The book sold 11 million copies in the first 24 hours of release, breaking down to 2.7 million copies in the UK and 8.3 million in the US.

entry.title: La Cour des comptes épingle la gestion interne de pôle Emploi

link.title: La Cour des comptes épingle la gestion interne de pôle Emploi

entry.content:
Dans un rapport publié jeudi, la Cour des comptes pointe des manquements dans la gestion interne de Pôle Emploi, notamment en termes d’absentéisme, de moyens accordés au dialogue social et de rémunérations de ses cadres.
Retrouvez "La matinale d’Europe 1 - Le 6h30 - 9h" sur :
entry.summary: Dans un rapport publié jeudi, la Cour des comptes pointe des manquements dans la gestion interne de Pôle Emploi, notamment en termes d’absentéisme, de moyens accordés au dialogue social et de rémunérations de ses cadres. Retrouvez "La matinale d’Europe 1 - Le 6h30 - 9h" sur :

entry.title: Bobby Deol starrer ‘Class of 83’ first look out

link.title: Bobby Deol starrer ‘Class of 83’ first look out

entry.content: The first look of Bobby Deol starrer ‘Class of 83’ is finally out now. The film is made under Shah Rukh Khan’s banner Red Chillies Entertainment.
entry.summary: The first look of Bobby Deol starrer ‘Class of 83’ is finally out now. The film is made under Shah Rukh Khan’s banner Red Chillies Entertainment.

entry.title: BBMP commissioner Anil Kumar transferred Oneindia Kannada

link.title: BBMP commissioner Anil Kumar transferred Oneindia Kannada

entry.content:
BBMP Commissioner B.H. Anil Kumar has been transferred. The government has appointed Manjunath Prasad, the general secretary of the Department of Revenue, as the BBMP’s new commissioner to replace Anil Kumar.
ಕೊರೊನಾ ವೈರಸ್ ಸೋಂಕು ಹರಡದಂತೆ ತಡೆಯಲು ಕಠಿಣ ಕ್ರಮಗಳನ್ನು ಕೈಗೊಂಡಿಲ್ಲ ಎಂದು ಬಿಬಿಎಂಪಿ ಆಯುಕ್ತ ಬಿ.ಎಚ್. ಅನಿಲ್‌ ಕುಮಾರ್‌ ಅವರನ್ನು ವರ್ಗಾವಣೆ ಮಾಡಿದೆ.
entry.summary: BBMP Commissioner B.H. Anil Kumar has been transferred. The government has appointed Manjunath Prasad, the general secretary of the Department of Revenue, as the BBMP’s new commissioner to replace Anil Kumar. ಕೊರೊನಾ ವೈರಸ್ ಸೋಂಕು ಹರಡದಂತೆ ತಡೆಯಲು ಕಠಿಣ ಕ್ರಮಗಳನ್ನು ಕೈಗೊಂಡಿಲ್ಲ ಎಂದು ಬಿಬಿಎಂಪಿ ಆಯುಕ್ತ ಬಿ.ಎಚ್. ಅನಿಲ್‌ ಕುಮಾರ್‌ ಅವರನ್ನು ವರ್ಗಾವಣೆ ಮಾಡಿದೆ.

entry.title: Farah Khan shares a throwback picture with Twinkle Khanna

link.title: Farah Khan shares a throwback picture with Twinkle Khanna

entry.content: Choreographer-filmmaker Farah Khan Kunder on Thursday recalled directing dance moves for Twinkle Khanna and Abhishek Kapoor in the 1997 release, "Uff! Yeh Mohabbat", with tongue-in-cheek reference to the title of the film.
entry.summary: Choreographer-filmmaker Farah Khan Kunder on Thursday recalled directing dance moves for Twinkle Khanna and Abhishek Kapoor in the 1997 release, "Uff! Yeh Mohabbat", with tongue-in-cheek reference to the title of the film.

entry.title: Bonjour le monde Film

link.title: Bonjour le monde Film

entry.content:
Bonjour le monde Film Bande-Annonce - trailer HD - Synopsis: De délicates marionnettes prennent vie en stop-motion, dans de superbes décors colorés, pour raconter aux petits et aux grands la vie de la faune et de la flore de nos campagnes et les sensibiliser à la préservation de la nature et à l’équilibre des écosystèmes. Une œuvre où les marionnettes, les sculptures, la peinture et l’animation réinterprètent la Nature, pour nous la faire redécouvrir comme nous ne l’avons jamais vue !
Un film d’Anne-Lise KOEHLER & Eric SERRE
A voir dès 5 ans
En salle dès le 15 juillet
entry.summary: Bonjour le monde Film Bande-Annonce - trailer HD - Synopsis: De délicates marionnettes prennent vie en stop-motion, dans de superbes décors colorés, pour raconter aux petits et aux grands la vie de la faune et de la flore de nos campagnes et les sensibiliser à la préservation de la nature et à l’équilibre des écosystèmes. Une œuvre où les marionnettes, les sculptures, la peinture et l’animation réinterprètent la Nature, pour nous la faire redécouvrir comme nous ne l’avons jamais vue ! Un film d’Anne-Lise KOEHLER & Eric SERRE A voir dès 5 ans En salle dès le 15 juillet

entry.title: Les courgettes sautées à la poêle, faciles et savoureuses

link.title: Les courgettes sautées à la poêle, faciles et savoureuses

entry.content:
LES RECETTES DE L’ÉTÉ - Chaque jour, notre journaliste culinaire Marion Sauveur propose une recette simple, savoureuse et facile à réaliser. Vendredi, elle nous invite à cuisiner la courgette, le légume estival par excellence.
Retrouvez "La matinale d’Europe 1 - Le 6h30 - 9h" sur :
entry.summary: LES RECETTES DE L’ÉTÉ - Chaque jour, notre journaliste culinaire Marion Sauveur propose une recette simple, savoureuse et facile à réaliser. Vendredi, elle nous invite à cuisiner la courgette, le légume estival par excellence. Retrouvez "La matinale d’Europe 1 - Le 6h30 - 9h" sur :

entry.title: Saint-Malo : dans les pas de Chateaubriand

link.title: Saint-Malo : dans les pas de Chateaubriand

entry.content:
C’est à Saint-Malo (Ille-et-Vilaine) que l’écrivain Chateaubriand est né et a voulu être enterré. Cette grande figure romantique a aussi passé son enfance au château de Combourg.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: C’est à Saint-Malo (Ille-et-Vilaine) que l’écrivain Chateaubriand est né et a voulu être enterré. Cette grande figure romantique a aussi passé son enfance au château de Combourg. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
